name: salon-erp-backend
description: Salon ERP Backend - Revenue Management API

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.join(__dirname, '../frontend'); const dst = path.join(__dirname, 'frontend'); if (fs.existsSync(src)) { const copy = (src, dst) => { if (!fs.existsSync(dst)) fs.mkdirSync(dst, { recursive: true }); fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f => { const srcf = path.join(src, f); const dstf = path.join(dst, f); fs.statSync(srcf).isDirectory() ? copy(srcf, dstf) : fs.copyFileSync(srcf, dstf); }); }; copy(src, dst); console.log('Frontend copied to backend'); }"
